title: v4 descriptor.json
description: Authoring-time schema for a v4 template's descriptor (proposal §3.1): identity, language axis, engine-compat gate, Q2 optionsSchema, and the replaceMap render context. One schema covers both create and modify templates; modify adds the optional kind and entry fields. The field whitelist here is the single machine-readable source of truth; the §3.1 prose is its human gloss.

id.description: Template identity. Routing references this via selector.json routes[].templateId.

kind.description: Routing / telemetry label only (proposal §13.1). Loader-validation that the package sits in the correct namespace; never a dispatch key. Optional; modify templates set 'modify'.

languages.description: Closed set of language variants the template offers (proposal §3.1.0). 'common' is the reserved single-member value for language-agnostic templates and makes Q0 auto-skip the language prompt.

minEngineVersion.description: Engine <-> package compatibility gate (proposal §5.2). An older fx-core meeting a higher minEngineVersion raises an explicit upgrade error (no silent fallback).

spec.description: Tooling-only, NOT read at runtime. Design-first gate (invariant 13, CI-warn): resolves to a scenario spec under docs/03-specs/scenarios/ containing an '## Acceptance Criteria' table. AC rows are the source of T3 assertions.

requiresNetwork.description: Offline-by-default declaration (proposal §3.1.1, CI invariant 14). Default false; openapi/search-api/kiota templates flip true.

entry.description: Optional CLI entry contract (modify templates). Names option ids that a pre-filled CLI arg / URL can supply to skip the matching question.

optionsSchema.description: JSON Schema for the Q2 options contract. Used for input validation and as the identifier-resolution domain for replaceMap expr entries.

replaceMap.description: Render context as a closed DSL: each entry is exactly one of {const} / {from} / {when,value} / {expr} (proposal §3.1). var MUST NOT name a caller-injected identifier.
